failures.title: GHOSTLIGHT PROTOCOL // CARE GATE FAILED
failures.explanation: That response did not preserve the care pattern this bud is testing.\n\nFailure costs time. Return to the hub, then re-enter with more patience.

branches.name: Document Control
branches.branch_purpose: This branch tests version discipline, correction discipline, scope, redaction, and update state.
branches.access_note: The receiver must understand that a living record changes when it is corrected.
branches.wwc_sections: 0.0 Document Control; 22.0 Public / Private / Restricted Export System; 23.13 Public-Safe Notes.

buds.prompt: An old map is found beside a corrected one. The old map explains how someone got lost; the corrected map shows where the receiver must walk now.
buds.body: A stale file can be historically useful.\nA corrected file changes the live route.\nA receiver who respects update state does not use the old map to overrule the present.
buds.warning: Common failures: treating the first record as permanent, treating correction as optional, or using an old map because it is easier to navigate.
buds.answer_prompt: Enter the principle that decides which map leads.
buds.label: response

bloom.reveal_text: Old records can explain history, but corrected truth leads the present. A receiver who respects update state does not force a living person back into a stale file.

buds.prompt: A receiver sees a redacted layer and an exposed layer in the same archive. The test is not whether they can reach further. The test is whether they know what the access means.
buds.body: Visibility is not ownership.\nRedaction is not a dare.\nConsent decides what a receiver may do with what they can see.
buds.warning: Common failures: confusing visibility with permission, treating privacy as obstruction, or treating a boundary as a challenge.
buds.answer_prompt: Enter the principle that keeps access from becoming entitlement.
buds.label: response

fruit.synthesis_text: A correct receiver respects versioning, correction, scope, and redaction. They do not treat one exposed layer as permission to force the next.

branches.name: Core Self
branches.branch_purpose: This branch teaches the receiver to hold a whole person instead of flattening them into one label, trait, need, wound, skill, or aesthetic.
branches.access_note: Route: five small rooms, each gives one earned piece.
branches.wwc_sections: 2.0 Core Self; 2.1 Identity and Names; 2.5 Personality Throughlines; 2.7 Values.

buds.prompt: The first room is not locked by a trick. It is locked by what the receiver mistakes for the whole.
buds.body: One mirror is never the person. The room opens for the receiver who keeps the pattern intact.
buds.warning: Common failures: choosing the most dramatic fragment, the most useful fragment, or the fragment that makes the receiver feel needed.
buds.answer_prompt: Enter the principle that keeps the mirrors from becoming a cage.
buds.label: answer packet

bloom.reveal_text: The receiver kept the pattern whole instead of choosing one mirror as the person.

buds.prompt: The registry contains many labels. Some are archive residue. Some are masks. Some are handles. One is the current signal.
buds.body: The signal is not the record name. Follow the chosen name.
buds.warning: Common failures: treating paperwork as closeness, using an old handle because it feels interesting, or choosing a label that makes the receiver feel clever.
buds.label: answer packet

bloom.reveal_text: The receiver followed the current chosen signal instead of treating archive labels as access.

buds.prompt: Patterns matter more than isolated flashes.
buds.body: Look for the repeated shape: care, structure, humor, intensity, and deliberate signal.
buds.warning: Common failures: flattening a throughline into a single mood.
buds.label: answer packet

bloom.reveal_text: The receiver read the throughline instead of grabbing one dramatic flash.

buds.prompt: The signal organizes complexity into usable structure.
buds.body: A system is care made repeatable when memory, energy, or context shifts.
buds.warning: Common failures: treating structure as coldness or control.
buds.label: answer packet

bloom.reveal_text: The receiver recognized structure as a care technology, not a cage.

buds.prompt: The final foundation lock opens when the receiver can name what must stay joined when things get hard.
buds.body: Truth without care becomes a blade. Care without strength becomes collapse. Strength without truth becomes control.
buds.warning: Common failures: flattering the aesthetic, praising intensity, offering rescue, or treating values as poetry instead of behavior.
buds.label: answer packet

fruit.synthesis_text: The core signal resolves around integration: truth, compassion, and power held together until they become behavior.
